# Visual Verification Contract

Material UI changes require visual verification unless the user explicitly asks for planning only.

## Minimum Viewports

- Desktop: around 1280x800.
- Mobile: around 390x844.

## Checkpoints

- Primary view is not blank.
- Assets render.
- Text does not overlap or escape containers.
- No unintended horizontal overflow.
- Focus and hover states are visible for key controls.
- Loading, empty, error, disabled, selected, submitting, and success states are covered when relevant.
- Marketing first viewport shows the real product, place, offer, brand, or object.

## Reporting

Record:

- command or browser tool used;
- viewport sizes;
- artifact paths;
- skipped reason if verification was not run.

Screenshots from authenticated or private products are sensitive artifacts.
